introSection: Clouds of Fairyland (Chinese: 云之秘境) is a steel roller coaster located at World Joyland in Wujin, Changzhou, Jiangsu, China. It is a SkyLoop installation from Maurer Rides.
fullText: Clouds of Fairyland (Chinese: 云之秘境) is a steel roller coaster located at World Joyland in Wujin, Changzhou, Jiangsu, China. It is a SkyLoop installation from Maurer Rides.
